overall.description: First-person exploration of a gothic castle interior from Hogwarts Legacy, specifically the Slytherin common room areas. The player walks through stone corridors with green stained glass, enters dormitory spaces with canopy beds, explores a grand hall with a serpentine staircase, and discovers a small upper chamber with a stained glass dome.
